info.name: PT Backend API
info.description:
REST API collection for the PT Backend (NestJS).

- Base URL uses `{{baseUrl}}` (default: http://localhost:3000/api)
- Protected endpoints use Bearer token: set `{{accessToken}}` after login or refresh
- All responses follow the standard envelope: `{ statusCode, success, timestamp, path, action, message, version, data }`
- Requests support `x-correlation-id` header for tracing (auto-generated if not provided)

request.description: Global health endpoint for load balancers and probes. No auth required. Path: GET /api/health (no version prefix).

item.name: Auth
item.description: Authentication and authorization endpoints. No Bearer auth on these requests.

request.description:
Authenticate user via Cognito and return JWT tokens.

Response data: `{ accessToken, expiresIn, refreshToken, tokenType }`

The test script auto-saves `accessToken` and `refreshToken` to environment variables.

Send password reset code to user email (if email exists in Cognito).

Response data: `{ delivery: { DeliveryMedium, Destination } }`

Reset password using the verification code sent via email.

Response data: `{ success: true }`

Get new access token using refresh token.

Response data: `{ accessToken, idToken, refreshToken, expiresIn, tokenType }`

The test script auto-saves new tokens to environment variables.

item.name: Requester
item.description: Requester (credit applicant) management. Create is public; other endpoints require JWT and specific roles.

body.raw:
{
  "curp": "CURP180000HDFLRN01",
  "rfc": "CUR180000ABC",
  "firstname": "Juan",
  "lastname": "Perez Lopez",
  "monthly_income": 15000.50,
  "email": "juan.perez@example.com",
  "password": "P@ssw0rd!",
  "address": "Calle Principal 123, Col. Centro",
  "gender": "M",
  "count_children": 2,
  "count_adults": 2,
  "count_family_members": 4,
  "civil_status": "Casado",
  "education_level": "Universidad",
  "occupation_type": 1,
  "days_employed": 365,
  "birthdate": "1990-01-15",
  "has_own_car": true,
  "has_own_realty": false,
  "has_active_request": false
}

request.description:
Create a new requester and register in Cognito. Throttled (5 req/min). No auth.

Required fields: curp, rfc, firstname, lastname, monthly_income, email, password, address, gender, count_children, count_adults, count_family_members, civil_status, education_level, occupation_type, days_employed, birthdate, has_own_car, has_own_realty.

Optional: has_active_request (default: false).

The test script auto-saves the created requester ID.

Get the requester profile for the authenticated user.

Requires role: requester.

Get requester by UUID.

Requires role: analyst or supervisor.

Update the authenticated requester. All fields optional (partial update). Password excluded from update.

Requires role: requester.

Update requester by UUID. All fields optional (partial update). Password excluded from update.

Requires role: analyst or supervisor.

Soft-delete the authenticated requester (also removes Cognito user).

Requires role: requester.

Soft-delete requester by UUID (also removes Cognito user).

Requires role: analyst or supervisor.

item.name: Request
item.description: Credit request management. Controller registered but no routes implemented yet. DTOs are defined for future use.

request.description:
NOT YET IMPLEMENTED — placeholder based on CreateRequestDto.

credit_type: personal | chattel | mortgage
status (optional): created (default) | in_review | approved | no_approved | accepted | rejected | completed
termination_date: ISO date string
amount: decimal (max 2 places)
has_guarantee: boolean
guarantee_value (optional): decimal
requester_id: UUID v4

item.name: Staff
item.description: Staff (analysts, supervisors) management. Module under construction.

request.description: Health endpoint for the staff module. No auth required.
